title: Indulgent Umami Portuguese Cheese Lasagna
description: A rich, cheesy lasagna dish with an umami kick, featuring hoisin sauce, tadka, and a hint of smokiness. This shojin-friendly recipe makes a perfect dinner for special occasions.

ingredients.name: Tadka oil
ingredients.notes: Ghee or vegetable oil can be used as a substitute

ingredients.name: Shredded cheese blend
ingredients.notes: Combine mozzarella, parmesan, and cheddar for the best results

instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the tadka oil over medium-high heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant. Then add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Stir in the hoisin sauce and cook for 1-2 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, mushroom mixture, and half of the shredded cheese blend. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish and top with the remaining cheese blend.
Bake the lasagna in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the lasagna from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
Garnish with chopped parsley and basil, and serve hot.
Optional: Add a sprinkle of grated Parmesan cheese on top of each serving for an extra burst of flavor.
